mapper.select:
SELECT A.PR_BUYER_CD ,getCustName(PRDT.GATE_CD, PRDT.PR_BUYER_CD) ' ' getDeptName(PRDT.GATE_CD, PRDT.PR_BUYER_CD, PRDT.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_NM , A.PURCHASE_TYPE , A.REQ_NUM , A.REQ_CNT , A.SUBJECT , A.RFX_TYPE , A.SETTLE_TYPE , A.CONT_TYPE1 , A.CONT_TYPE2 , A.CONT_TYPE3 , A.CONT_TYPE , A.ITEM_CD , A.ITEM_DESC , A.ITEM_SPEC , A.BID_QT ,(CASE WHEN A.ADJ_PRC_STATUS IN ('100', '150') THEN NULL ELSE A.PR_QT END) AS PR_QT -- 대기, 임시저장시 NULL , A.UNIT_CD , A.VENDOR_CD , A.VENDOR_NM , A.CUR ,(CASE WHEN A.ADJ_PRC_STATUS IN ('100', '150') THEN NULL ELSE A.PR_AMT END) AS PR_AMT -- 대기, 임시저장시 NULL , A.TCO_YEAR_CNT ,(CASE WHEN A.ADJ_PRC_STATUS IN ('100', '150') THEN NULL ELSE A.TCO_AMT END) AS TCO_AMT -- 대기, 임시저장시 NULL , A.VAT_TYPE , A.QTA_NUM , A.VOTE_DATE , A.SETTLE_DATE , A.PR_NUM , A.CTRL_USER_ID , A.CTRL_USER_NM , A.END_DATE , A.VOTE_CNT , PRHD.SUBJECT AS PR_SUBJECT , A.EXEC_WT_NUM , A.BUYER_CD , A.TCO_FLAG , A.PB_BUYER_CD ,(CASE WHEN A.ADJ_PRC_STATUS = '150' THEN '100' ELSE A.ADJ_PRC_STATUS END) AS ADJ_PRC_STATUS , A.VEND_QT_FLAG -- 협력사 투찰시 품목별 투찰수량 변경여부(1/0) , PRHD.IF_TYPE ,(PRHD.PR_TYPE, '10') AS PR_TYPE , PRDT.PRE_BUYER_CD , PRDT.PRE_CONT_NUM , PRDT.PRE_CONT_CNT , PRDT.CM_REQ_ID FROM ( SELECT BDDT.PURCHASE_TYPE , HB.BID_NUM AS REQ_NUM , HB.BID_CNT AS REQ_CNT , BDHD.ANN_ITEM AS SUBJECT , HB.RFX_TYPE , BDHD.CONT_TYPE2 AS SETTLE_TYPE ,GETCOMCODE(BDHD.GATE_CD, 'M301', BDHD.CONT_TYPE1, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS CONT_TYPE1 ,GETCOMCODE(BDHD.GATE_CD, 'M302', BDHD.CONT_TYPE2, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS CONT_TYPE2 ,GETCOMCODE(BDHD.GATE_CD, 'M303', BDHD.CONT_TYPE3, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS CONT_TYPE3 , BDHD.CONT_TYPE2 AS CONT_TYPE , BDDT.ITEM_CD , BDDT.ITEM_DESC , BDDT.ITEM_SPEC , BDDT.PR_QT AS BID_QT -- 고객사 입찰수량 ,(CASE WHEN (BDVD.PR_QT, '0') = '0' THEN BDDT.PR_QT ELSE BDVD.PR_QT END) AS PR_QT -- 협력사 투찰수량(투찰수량 변경 가능) , BDDT.UNIT_CD , HB.VENDOR_CD , VNGL.VENDOR_NM , BDHD.CUR , BDVD.PR_AMT , BDHD.TCO_YEAR_CNT , BDVD.TCO_AMT , BDHD.VAT_TYPE , BDHD.BID_NUM AS QTA_NUM ,(BDVO.VOTE_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS VOTE_DATE ,((BDVO.SETTLE_DATE, BDVO.MOD_DATE), 'YYYYMMDD') AS SETTLE_DATE -- 2021.11.02 낙찰일자 추가 , BDDT.PR_NUM , BDDT.PR_SQ , BDDT.PR_BUYER_CD , BDHD.BID_USER_ID AS CTRL_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(BDHD.GATE_CD, BDHD.BID_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CTRL_USER_NM ,(BDPG.BID_END_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS END_DATE ,(BDHD.TCO_FLAG, '0') AS TCO_FLAG , BDVO.VOTE_CNT , HB.EXEC_WT_NUM , HB.GATE_CD , HB.BUYER_CD , HB.PB_BUYER_CD ,(BDVO.ADJ_PRC_STATUS, '100') AS ADJ_PRC_STATUS ,(CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCBDVD WHERE GATE_CD = BDVD.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = BDVD.BUYER_CD AND BID_NUM = BDVD.BID_NUM AND BID_CNT = BDVD.BID_CNT AND VOTE_CNT = BDVD.VOTE_CNT AND VENDOR_CD= BDVD.VENDOR_CD AND (PR_QT, 0) > 0 AND (PR_QT, 0) != (BDDT.PR_QT, 0) AND DEL_FLAG = '0') > 0 THEN '1' ELSE '0' END) AS VEND_QT_FLAG -- 협력사 투찰시 품목별 투찰수량 변경여부 FROM STOCCNHB HB LEFT JOIN STOCVNGL VNGL ON (HB.GATE_CD = VNGL.GATE_CD AND HB.VENDOR_CD = VNGL.VENDOR_CD) JOIN STOCBDDT BDDT ON (HB.GATE_CD = BDDT.GATE_CD AND HB.BUYER_CD = BDDT.BUYER_CD AND HB.BID_NUM = BDDT.BID_NUM AND HB.BID_CNT = BDDT.BID_CNT AND HB.ITEM_SQ = BDDT.ITEM_SQ AND BDDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCBDHD BDHD ON (HB.GATE_CD = BDHD.GATE_CD AND HB.BUYER_CD = BDHD.BUYER_CD AND HB.BID_NUM = BDHD.BID_NUM AND HB.BID_CNT = BDHD.BID_CNT AND BDHD.BID_STATUS = '2500' AND BDHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCBDVD BDVD ON (HB.GATE_CD = BDVD.GATE_CD AND HB.BUYER_CD = BDVD.BUYER_CD AND HB.BID_NUM = BDVD.BID_NUM AND HB.BID_CNT = BDVD.BID_CNT AND HB.VOTE_CNT = BDVD.VOTE_CNT AND HB.VENDOR_CD = BDVD.VENDOR_CD AND HB.ITEM_SQ = BDVD.ITEM_SQ AND BDVD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCBDVO BDVO ON (BDVD.GATE_CD = BDVO.GATE_CD AND BDVD.BUYER_CD = BDVO.BUYER_CD AND BDVD.BID_NUM = BDVO.BID_NUM AND BDVD.BID_CNT = BDVO.BID_CNT AND BDVD.VOTE_CNT = BDVO.VOTE_CNT AND BDVD.VENDOR_CD = BDVO.VENDOR_CD AND BDVO.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCBDPG BDPG ON (HB.GATE_CD = BDPG.GATE_CD AND HB.BUYER_CD = BDPG.BUYER_CD AND HB.BID_NUM = BDPG.BID_NUM AND HB.BID_CNT = BDPG.BID_CNT AND HB.VOTE_CNT = BDPG.VOTE_CNT) WHERE HB.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HB.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND HB.DEL_FLAG = '0'
UNION ALL
SELECT RQDT.PURCHASE_TYPE , CNHB.RFX_NUM AS REQ_NUM , CNHB.RFX_CNT AS REQ_CNT , RQHD.RFX_SUBJECT AS SUBJECT , CNHB.RFX_TYPE , 'LP' AS SETTLE_TYPE -- 견적에서는 '최저가' ,GETCOMCODE(RQHD.GATE_CD, 'M066', RQHD.VENDOR_OPEN_TYPE, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS CONT_TYPE1 ,(CASE WHEN CNHB.RFX_TYPE = 'RPC' or CNHB.RFX_TYPE = 'RCA' or CNHB.RFX_TYPE = 'RFQ' or CNHB.RFX_TYPE = 'RYQ' THEN NULL ELSE GETCOMCODE(RQHD.GATE_CD, 'M302', 'LP', 0, #{ses.langCd}) END) AS CONT_TYPE2 ,GETCOMCODE(RQHD.GATE_CD, 'M303', RQHD.AMT_TYPE, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS CONT_TYPE3 ,(CASE WHEN CNHB.RFX_TYPE = 'RPC' or CNHB.RFX_TYPE = 'RCA' or CNHB.RFX_TYPE = 'RFQ' or CNHB.RFX_TYPE = 'RYQ' THEN NULL ELSE 'LP' END) AS CONT_TYPE , RQDT.ITEM_CD , RQDT.ITEM_DESC , RQDT.ITEM_SPEC , RQDT.RFX_QT AS BID_QT , RQDT.RFX_QT AS PR_QT , RQDT.UNIT_CD , CNHB.VENDOR_CD , VNGL.VENDOR_NM , RQHD.CUR , QTDT.SETTLE_AMT AS PR_AMT , 0 AS TCO_YEAR_CNT , 0 AS TCO_AMT , RQHD.VAT_TYPE , QTHD.QTA_NUM ,(QTHD.SEND_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS VOTE_DATE ,(RQDT.SETTLE_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS SETTLE_DATE , RQDT.PR_NUM , RQDT.PR_SQ , RQDT.PR_BUYER_CD , RQHD.CTRL_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(RQHD.GATE_CD, RQHD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CTRL_USER_NM ,(RQHD.RFX_END_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS END_DATE , '0' AS TCO_FLAG , 0 AS VOTE_CNT , CNHB.EXEC_WT_NUM , CNHB.GATE_CD , CNHB.BUYER_CD , CNHB.PB_BUYER_CD , '' AS ADJ_PRC_STATUS , '0' AS VEND_QT_FLAG FROM STOCCNHB CNHB LEFT JOIN STOCVNGL VNGL ON (CNHB.GATE_CD = VNGL.GATE_CD AND CNHB.VENDOR_CD = VNGL.VENDOR_CD) JOIN STOCRQDT RQDT ON (CNHB.GATE_CD = RQDT.GATE_CD AND CNHB.BUYER_CD = RQDT.BUYER_CD AND CNHB.RFX_NUM = RQDT.RFX_NUM AND CNHB.RFX_CNT = RQDT.RFX_CNT AND CNHB.RFX_SQ = RQDT.RFX_SQ AND RQDT.PROGRESS_CD = '2500' -- 업체선정 AND RQDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCRQHD RQHD ON (CNHB.GATE_CD = RQHD.GATE_CD AND CNHB.BUYER_CD = RQHD.BUYER_CD AND CNHB.RFX_NUM = RQHD.RFX_NUM AND CNHB.RFX_CNT = RQHD.RFX_CNT AND RQHD.PROGRESS_CD = '2500' -- 업체선정 AND RQHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCRQVN RQVN ON (CNHB.GATE_CD = RQVN.GATE_CD AND CNHB.BUYER_CD = RQVN.BUYER_CD AND CNHB.RFX_NUM = RQVN.RFX_NUM AND CNHB.RFX_CNT = RQVN.RFX_CNT AND CNHB.VENDOR_CD = RQVN.VENDOR_CD AND RQVN.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCQTHD QTHD ON (RQVN.GATE_CD = QTHD.GATE_CD AND RQVN.BUYER_CD = QTHD.BUYER_CD AND RQVN.RFX_NUM = QTHD.RFX_NUM AND RQVN.RFX_CNT = QTHD.RFX_CNT AND RQVN.VENDOR_CD = QTHD.VENDOR_CD AND QTHD.SEND_DATE IS NOT NULL AND QTHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCQTDT QTDT ON (QTHD.GATE_CD = QTDT.GATE_CD AND QTHD.BUYER_CD = QTDT.BUYER_CD AND QTHD.QTA_NUM = QTDT.QTA_NUM AND QTDT.QTA_SQ = RQDT.RFX_SQ AND (CASE WHEN QTDT.SETTLE_AMT IS NULL OR QTDT.SETTLE_AMT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE QTDT.SETTLE_AMT END) > 0 -- 선정금액 > 0 AND QTDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE CNHB.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND CNHB.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND CNHB.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND RQHD.RFX_TYPE IN ('RFQ','RYQ','RPC','RCA') /** 견적, 견적(연단가), 수의시담, 부속합의 */ ) A LEFT JOIN STOCPRDT PRDT ON (A.GATE_CD = PRDT.GATE_CD AND A.PR_BUYER_CD = PRDT.PR_BUYER_CD AND A.PR_NUM = PRDT.PR_NUM AND A.PR_SQ = PRDT.PR_SQ) LEFT JOIN STOCPRHD PRHD ON (PRDT.GATE_CD = PRHD.GATE_CD AND PRDT.BUYER_CD = PRHD.BUYER_CD AND PRDT.PR_NUM = PRHD.PR_NUM) WHERE PRDT.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND PRHD.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND A.END_DATE >= #{END_DATE_FROM} AND A.END_DATE <= #{END_DATE_TO}
AND PRDT.PR_BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD}
AND UPPER(getCustName(PRDT.GATE_CD, PRDT.PR_BUYER_CD)) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(A.REQ_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{REQ_NUM}) '%'
AND UPPER(REPLACE(A.SUBJECT, ' ', '')) LIKE '%' UPPER(REPLACE(#{SUBJECT}, ' ', '')) '%'
AND A.CTRL_USER_ID = #{CTRL_USER_ID}
AND UPPER(A.CTRL_USER_NM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CTRL_USER_NM}) '%'
AND A.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD}
AND UPPER(A.VENDOR_NM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{VENDOR_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(A.PR_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PR_NUM}) '%'
AND UPPER(REPLACE(PRHD.SUBJECT, ' ', '')) LIKE '%' UPPER(REPLACE(#{PR_SUBJECT}, ' ', '')) '%'
ORDER BY A.EXEC_WT_NUM DESC

SELECT HB.BUYER_CD ,HB.BID_NUM, HB.BID_CNT ,HB.VOTE_CNT, HB.VENDOR_CD ,HB.EXEC_WT_NUM ,HB.PR_NUM, HB.PR_SQ, HB.PB_BUYER_CD FROM STOCCNHB HB INNER JOIN (SELECT C.GATE_CD, C.BUYER_CD, C.BID_NUM, C.BID_CNT FROM STOCCNHB C WHERE C.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND C.EXEC_WT_NUM = #{EXEC_WT_NUM}) SUB ON (HB.GATE_CD = SUB.GATE_CD AND HB.BUYER_CD = SUB.BUYER_CD AND HB.BID_NUM = SUB.BID_NUM AND HB.BID_CNT = SUB.BID_CNT) WHERE HB.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd}

SELECT A.VENDOR_CD , A.VENDOR_NM , A.IRS_NO , A.CEO_USER_NM , SUM(A.PR_AMT) AS RFX_AMT , SUM(A.PR_AMT) AS PR_AMT , A.TCO_YEAR_CNT , SUM(A.TCO_AMT) AS TCO_AMT , '1' AS CONT_FLAG , A.PIC_USER_ID , A.PIC_USER_NM , A.PIC_TEL_NUM , A.PIC_EMAIL , NULL AS CONT_USER_ID , NULL AS CONT_USER_NM , NULL AS PO_USER_ID , NULL AS PO_USER_NM , A.BUYER_CD , NULL AS EXEC_NUM FROM ( SELECT HB.VENDOR_CD , VNGL.VENDOR_NM , VNGL.IRS_NO ,VNGL.CEO_USER_NM AS CEO_USER_NM , BDVD.PR_AMT , BDHD.TCO_YEAR_CNT , BDVD.TCO_AMT , BDVD.REG_USER_ID AS PIC_USER_ID ,(BDAP.VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM, GETUSERNAME(BDVD.GATE_CD, BDVD.REG_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd})) AS PIC_USER_NM ,(BDAP.VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM,(GETUSERINFO(BDVD.GATE_CD, BDVD.REG_USER_ID, 'TEL_NUM'), GETUSERINFO(BDVD.GATE_CD, BDVD.REG_USER_ID, 'CELL_NUM'))) AS PIC_TEL_NUM ,BDAP.VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL AS PIC_EMAIL , HB.BUYER_CD FROM STOCCNHB HB LEFT JOIN STOCVNGL VNGL ON (HB.GATE_CD = VNGL.GATE_CD AND HB.VENDOR_CD = VNGL.VENDOR_CD) JOIN STOCBDDT BDDT ON (HB.GATE_CD = BDDT.GATE_CD AND HB.BUYER_CD = BDDT.BUYER_CD AND HB.BID_NUM = BDDT.BID_NUM AND HB.BID_CNT = BDDT.BID_CNT AND HB.ITEM_SQ = BDDT.ITEM_SQ AND BDDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCBDHD BDHD ON (HB.GATE_CD = BDHD.GATE_CD AND HB.BUYER_CD = BDHD.BUYER_CD AND HB.BID_NUM = BDHD.BID_NUM AND HB.BID_CNT = BDHD.BID_CNT AND BDHD.BID_STATUS = '2500' AND BDHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCBDAP BDAP ON (HB.GATE_CD = BDAP.GATE_CD AND HB.BUYER_CD = BDAP.BUYER_CD AND HB.BID_NUM = BDAP.BID_NUM AND HB.BID_CNT = BDAP.BID_CNT AND HB.VENDOR_CD = BDAP.VENDOR_CD AND BDAP.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCBDVD BDVD ON (HB.GATE_CD = BDVD.GATE_CD AND HB.BUYER_CD = BDVD.BUYER_CD AND HB.BID_NUM = BDVD.BID_NUM AND HB.BID_CNT = BDVD.BID_CNT AND HB.VOTE_CNT = BDVD.VOTE_CNT AND HB.VENDOR_CD = BDVD.VENDOR_CD AND HB.ITEM_SQ = BDVD.ITEM_SQ AND BDVD.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE HB.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HB.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND HB.EXEC_WT_NUM IN ${paramExecWtNum} AND HB.DEL_FLAG = '0'
UNION ALL
SELECT QTDT.VENDOR_CD , VNGL.VENDOR_NM , VNGL.IRS_NO ,VNGL.CEO_USER_NM AS CEO_USER_NM , SUM(QTDT.SETTLE_AMT) AS PR_AMT , 0 AS TCO_YEAR_CNT , 0 AS TCO_AMT , QTHD.REG_USER_ID AS PIC_USER_ID ,QTHD.PIC_USER_NM AS PIC_USER_NM ,QTHD.PIC_TEL_NUM AS PIC_TEL_NUM ,QTHD.PIC_EMAIL AS PIC_EMAIL , CNHB.BUYER_CD FROM STOCCNHB CNHB LEFT JOIN STOCVNGL VNGL ON( CNHB.GATE_CD = VNGL.GATE_CD AND CNHB.VENDOR_CD = VNGL.VENDOR_CD) JOIN STOCQTDT QTDT ON( CNHB.GATE_CD = QTDT.GATE_CD AND CNHB.BUYER_CD = QTDT.BUYER_CD AND CNHB.RFX_NUM = QTDT.RFX_NUM AND CNHB.RFX_CNT = QTDT.RFX_CNT AND CNHB.RFX_SQ = QTDT.RFX_SQ AND CNHB.VENDOR_CD = QTDT.VENDOR_CD AND QTDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCQTHD QTHD ON( QTDT.GATE_CD = QTHD.GATE_CD AND QTDT.BUYER_CD = QTHD.BUYER_CD AND QTDT.QTA_NUM = QTHD.QTA_NUM AND QTHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCRQHD RQHD ON( QTHD.GATE_CD = RQHD.GATE_CD AND QTHD.BUYER_CD = RQHD.BUYER_CD AND QTHD.RFX_NUM = RQHD.RFX_NUM AND QTHD.RFX_CNT = RQHD.RFX_CNT AND RQHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE CNHB.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND CNHB.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND CNHB.EXEC_WT_NUM IN ${paramExecWtNum} AND CNHB.DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY QTDT.VENDOR_CD, VNGL.VENDOR_NM, VNGL.IRS_NO, VNGL.CEO_USER_NM, QTHD.REG_USER_ID, QTHD.PIC_USER_NM, QTHD.PIC_TEL_NUM, QTHD.PIC_EMAIL, CNHB.BUYER_CD ) A GROUP BY A.BUYER_CD, A.VENDOR_CD, A.VENDOR_NM, A.IRS_NO, A.CEO_USER_NM, A.TCO_YEAR_CNT, A.PIC_USER_ID, A.PIC_USER_NM, A.PIC_TEL_NUM, A.PIC_EMAIL

SELECT A.VENDOR_CD , A.VENDOR_NM , A.IRS_NO ,A.CEO_USER_NM AS CEO_USER_NM ,((SELECT RFX_AMT FROM STOCCNVD WHERE GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND EXEC_NUM = A.EXEC_NUM AND VENDOR_CD = A.VENDOR_CD), SUM(A.EXEC_AMT)) AS RFX_AMT -- 2021.06.09 변경 --, SUM(A.EXEC_QT * A.UNIT_PRC) AS PR_AMT , SUM(A.EXEC_AMT) AS PR_AMT , MAX(A.TCO_YEAR) AS TCO_YEAR_CNT , SUM(A.TCO_AMT) AS TCO_AMT , A.CONT_FLAG , A.PIC_USER_ID ,A.PIC_USER_NM AS PIC_USER_NM ,A.PIC_TEL_NUM AS PIC_TEL_NUM ,A.PIC_EMAIL AS PIC_EMAIL , A.CONT_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(#{ses.gateCd}, A.CONT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CONT_USER_NM , A.PO_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(#{ses.gateCd}, A.PO_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS PO_USER_NM , A.BUYER_CD , A.EXEC_NUM , A.BID_NUM , A.BID_CNT , A.VOTE_CNT FROM ( SELECT VD.VENDOR_CD , VNGL.VENDOR_NM , VNGL.IRS_NO , VNGL.CEO_USER_NM , DT.EXEC_QT , DT.UNIT_PRC , DT.EXEC_AMT , DT.TCO_YEAR , DT.TCO_AMT , VD.CONT_FLAG , NULL AS PIC_USER_ID , VD.PIC_USER_NM , VD.PIC_TEL_NUM , VD.PIC_EMAIL , VD.CONT_USER_ID , VD.PO_USER_ID , DT.GATE_CD , DT.BUYER_CD , DT.EXEC_NUM , DT.BID_NUM , DT.BID_CNT , DT.VOTE_CNT FROM STOCCNHD HD JOIN STOCCNDT DT ON (HD.GATE_CD = DT.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = DT.BUYER_CD AND HD.EXEC_NUM = DT.EXEC_NUM) JOIN STOCCNVD VD ON (HD.GATE_CD = VD.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = VD.BUYER_CD AND HD.EXEC_NUM = VD.EXEC_NUM AND DT.VENDOR_CD = VD.VENDOR_CD) LEFT JOIN STOCVNGL VNGL ON (VD.GATE_CD = VNGL.GATE_CD AND VD.VENDOR_CD = VNGL.VENDOR_CD) WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND HD.EXEC_NUM = #{EXEC_NUM} AND HD.DEL_FLAG = '0' ) A WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY A.VENDOR_CD, A.VENDOR_NM, A.IRS_NO, A.CEO_USER_NM, A.CONT_FLAG , A.PIC_USER_ID, A.PIC_USER_NM, A.PIC_TEL_NUM, A.PIC_EMAIL, A.CONT_USER_ID , A.PO_USER_ID, A.BUYER_CD, A.EXEC_NUM, A.GATE_CD, A.BID_NUM, A.BID_CNT, A.VOTE_CNT

SELECT A.PR_BUYER_CD ,getCustName(A.GATE_CD, A.PR_BUYER_CD) AS PR_BUYER_NM, A.PR_DEPT_CD , A.PURCHASE_TYPE , A.ITEM_CD , A.ITEM_DESC , A.ITEM_SPEC , A.MAKER_CD ,GETMKBRNAME(A.GATE_CD, A.BUYER_CD, 'MK', A.MAKER_CD) AS MAKER_NM , A.MAKER_ART_NO , A.ORIGIN_CD , A.VENDOR_CD , A.VENDOR_NM , A.PR_QT , A.UNIT_CD ,(CASE WHEN A.RFX_TYPE = 'BID' THEN (SELECT (PRE_VD.UNIT_PRC, 0) FROM STOCBDVD PRE_VD WHERE PRE_VD.GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND PRE_VD.BUYER_CD = A.BUYER_CD AND PRE_VD.BID_NUM = A.REQ_NUM AND PRE_VD.BID_CNT = A.REQ_CNT AND PRE_VD.VOTE_CNT = (A.VOTE_CNT - 1) AND PRE_VD.VENDOR_CD = A.VENDOR_CD AND PRE_VD.ITEM_SQ = A.ITEM_SQ) ELSE (SELECT (PRE_QT.UNIT_PRC, 0) FROM STOCQTDT PRE_QT WHERE PRE_QT.GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND PRE_QT.RFX_NUM = A.REQ_NUM AND PRE_QT.RFX_CNT =(A.REQ_CNT - 1) AND PRE_QT.RFX_SQ = A.ITEM_SQ AND PRE_QT.VENDOR_CD = A.VENDOR_CD AND PRE_QT.DEL_FLAG = '0') END) AS PRE_UNIT_PRC , A.UNIT_PRC , 0 AS DISCOUNT_RATE , A.BUYER_CD , A.REQ_NUM , A.REQ_CNT , A.RFX_TYPE , A.ITEM_SQ , A.EXEC_WT_NUM , A.VOTE_CNT , A.QTA_NUM , A.QTA_SQ , A.CONT_TYPE1 , A.CONT_TYPE2 , A.CONT_TYPE3 , A.PR_AMT , A.TCO_YEAR_CNT , A.TCO_AMT , A.SW_BUS_AMT , 0 AS SW_BUS_RATE , A.MNT_SANGJU_YN , A.CONSUMER_AMT , 0 AS CONSUMER_RATE , A.FC_MNT_TERM , A.CH_RATE , A.DOIB_AMOUNT , A.MNT_RATE , A.MNT_SDAY , A.MNT_EDAY , A.MNT_GUR_MONTH , A.RT_INSP_PERIOD , A.FALT_RC_TG_TIME , A.DUE_DATE , A.BATT_FILE_NUM , TO_CHAR(GETFILECOUNT(A.GATE_CD, A.BATT_FILE_NUM)) AS BATT_FILE_CNT , A.SATT_FILE_NUM , TO_CHAR(GETFILECOUNT(A.GATE_CD, A.SATT_FILE_NUM)) AS SATT_FILE_CNT , A.BITEM_RMK , A.SITEM_RMK , '0' AS INFO_FLAG , '' AS VALID_FROM_DATE , '' AS VALID_TO_DATE , A.PB_BUYER_CD , A.PR_NUM , A.PR_SQ , PRHD.IF_TYPE ,(PRHD.PR_TYPE, '10') AS PR_TYPE , PRDT.PRE_BUYER_CD , PRDT.PRE_CONT_NUM , PRDT.PRE_CONT_CNT , PRDT.CM_REQ_ID FROM ( SELECT BDDT.PR_BUYER_CD , BDDT.PR_DEPT_CD , BDDT.PURCHASE_TYPE , BDDT.ITEM_CD , BDDT.ITEM_DESC , BDDT.ITEM_SPEC , BDDT.MAKER_CD , BDDT.MAKER_ART_NO , BDDT.ORIGIN_CD , HB.VENDOR_CD , VNGL.VENDOR_NM ,(CASE WHEN (BDVD.PR_QT, '0') = '0' THEN BDDT.PR_QT ELSE BDVD.PR_QT END) AS PR_QT -- 협력사 투찰수량(존재하는 경우 투찰수량을 사용함) , BDDT.UNIT_CD , BDVD.UNIT_PRC , BDHD.CONT_TYPE1 , BDHD.CONT_TYPE2 , BDHD.CONT_TYPE3 , HB.PR_NUM , HB.PR_SQ , BDVD.PR_AMT , BDHD.TCO_YEAR_CNT , BDVD.TCO_AMT , BDVD.SW_BUS_AMT , BDVD.MNT_SANGJU_YN , BDVD.CONSUMER_AMT , BDVD.FC_MNT_TERM , BDVD.CH_RATE , BDVD.DOIB_AMOUNT , BDVD.MNT_RATE ,(BDVD.MNT_SDAY, 'YYYYMMDD') AS MNT_SDAY ,(BDVD.MNT_EDAY, 'YYYYMMDD') AS MNT_EDAY , BDVD.MNT_GUR_MONTH , BDVD.RT_INSP_PERIOD , BDVD.FALT_RC_TG_TIME ,(BDDT.DUE_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DUE_DATE , BDDT.ATT_FILE_NUM AS BATT_FILE_NUM , BDVD.ATT_FILE_NUM AS SATT_FILE_NUM , BDDT.ITEM_RMK AS BITEM_RMK , BDVD.ITEM_RMK AS SITEM_RMK , BDDT.BID_NUM AS REQ_NUM , BDDT.BID_CNT AS REQ_CNT , BDVD.VOTE_CNT , BDDT.ITEM_SQ , HB.QTA_NUM , HB.QTA_SQ , HB.GATE_CD , HB.BUYER_CD , HB.RFX_TYPE , HB.EXEC_WT_NUM , HB.PB_BUYER_CD FROM STOCCNHB HB LEFT JOIN STOCVNGL VNGL ON (HB.GATE_CD = VNGL.GATE_CD AND HB.VENDOR_CD = VNGL.VENDOR_CD) JOIN STOCBDDT BDDT ON (HB.GATE_CD = BDDT.GATE_CD AND HB.BUYER_CD = BDDT.BUYER_CD AND HB.BID_NUM = BDDT.BID_NUM AND HB.BID_CNT = BDDT.BID_CNT AND HB.ITEM_SQ = BDDT.ITEM_SQ AND BDDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCBDHD BDHD ON (HB.GATE_CD = BDHD.GATE_CD AND HB.BUYER_CD = BDHD.BUYER_CD AND HB.BID_NUM = BDHD.BID_NUM AND HB.BID_CNT = BDHD.BID_CNT AND BDHD.BID_STATUS = '2500' AND BDHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCBDVD BDVD ON (HB.GATE_CD = BDVD.GATE_CD AND HB.BUYER_CD = BDVD.BUYER_CD AND HB.BID_NUM = BDVD.BID_NUM AND HB.BID_CNT = BDVD.BID_CNT AND HB.VOTE_CNT = BDVD.VOTE_CNT AND HB.VENDOR_CD = BDVD.VENDOR_CD AND HB.ITEM_SQ = BDVD.ITEM_SQ AND BDVD.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE HB.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HB.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND HB.EXEC_WT_NUM IN ${paramExecWtNum} AND HB.DEL_FLAG = '0'
UNION ALL
SELECT RQDT.PR_BUYER_CD , RQDT.PR_DEPT_CD , RQDT.PURCHASE_TYPE , RQDT.ITEM_CD , RQDT.ITEM_DESC , RQDT.ITEM_SPEC , RQDT.MAKER_CD , RQDT.MAKER_PART_NO AS MAKER_ART_NO , RQDT.ORIGIN_CD , CNHB.VENDOR_CD , VNGL.VENDOR_NM , RQDT.RFX_QT AS PR_QT , RQDT.UNIT_CD , QTDT.UNIT_PRC , RQHD.VENDOR_OPEN_TYPE AS CONT_TYPE1 , NULL AS CONT_TYPE2 , RQHD.AMT_TYPE AS CONT_TYPE3 , RQDT.PR_NUM , RQDT.PR_SQ , QTDT.SETTLE_AMT AS PR_AMT , 0 AS TCO_YEAR_CNT , 0 AS TCO_AMT , QTDT.SW_BUS_PRICE , QTDT.MNT_SANGJU_YN , QTDT.CONSUMER_AMT , QTDT.FC_MNT_TERM , QTDT.CH_RATE , QTDT.DOIB_AMT , QTDT.MNT_RATE ,(QTDT.MNT_SDAY, 'YYYYMMDD') AS MNT_SDAY ,(QTDT.MNT_EDAY, 'YYYYMMDD') AS MNT_EDAY , QTDT.MNT_GUR_MONTH , QTDT.RT_INSP_PERIOD , QTDT.FALT_RC_TG_TIME ,(RQDT.DUE_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DUE_DATE , RQDT.ATT_FILE_NUM AS BATT_FILE_NUM , QTDT.ATT_FILE_NUM AS SATT_FILE_NUM , RQDT.ITEM_RMK AS BITEM_RMK , QTDT.ITEM_RMK AS SITEM_RMK , CNHB.RFX_NUM AS REQ_NUM , CNHB.RFX_CNT AS REQ_CNT , 0 AS VOTE_CNT , CNHB.RFX_SQ AS ITEM_SQ , CNHB.QTA_NUM , CNHB.QTA_SQ , CNHB.GATE_CD , CNHB.BUYER_CD , CNHB.RFX_TYPE , CNHB.EXEC_WT_NUM , CNHB.PB_BUYER_CD FROM STOCCNHB CNHB LEFT JOIN STOCVNGL VNGL ON (CNHB.GATE_CD = VNGL.GATE_CD AND CNHB.VENDOR_CD = VNGL.VENDOR_CD) JOIN STOCRQDT RQDT ON (CNHB.GATE_CD = RQDT.GATE_CD AND CNHB.BUYER_CD = RQDT.BUYER_CD AND CNHB.RFX_NUM = RQDT.RFX_NUM AND CNHB.RFX_CNT = RQDT.RFX_CNT AND CNHB.RFX_SQ = RQDT.RFX_SQ AND RQDT.PROGRESS_CD = '2500' -- 업체선정 AND RQDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCRQHD RQHD ON (CNHB.GATE_CD = RQHD.GATE_CD AND CNHB.BUYER_CD = RQHD.BUYER_CD AND CNHB.RFX_NUM = RQHD.RFX_NUM AND CNHB.RFX_CNT = RQHD.RFX_CNT AND RQHD.PROGRESS_CD = '2500' -- 업체선정 AND RQHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCRQVN RQVN ON (CNHB.GATE_CD = RQVN.GATE_CD AND CNHB.BUYER_CD = RQVN.BUYER_CD AND CNHB.RFX_NUM = RQVN.RFX_NUM AND CNHB.RFX_CNT = RQVN.RFX_CNT AND CNHB.VENDOR_CD = RQVN.VENDOR_CD AND RQVN.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCQTHD QTHD ON (RQVN.GATE_CD = QTHD.GATE_CD AND RQVN.BUYER_CD = QTHD.BUYER_CD AND RQVN.RFX_NUM = QTHD.RFX_NUM AND RQVN.RFX_CNT = QTHD.RFX_CNT AND RQVN.VENDOR_CD = QTHD.VENDOR_CD AND QTHD.SEND_DATE IS NOT NULL AND QTHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCQTDT QTDT ON (QTHD.GATE_CD = QTDT.GATE_CD AND QTHD.BUYER_CD = QTDT.BUYER_CD AND QTHD.QTA_NUM = QTDT.QTA_NUM AND QTDT.QTA_SQ = RQDT.RFX_SQ AND (CASE WHEN QTDT.SETTLE_AMT IS NULL OR QTDT.SETTLE_AMT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE QTDT.SETTLE_AMT END) > 0 -- 선정금액 > 0 AND QTDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE CNHB.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND CNHB.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND CNHB.EXEC_WT_NUM IN ${paramExecWtNum} AND CNHB.DEL_FLAG = '0' ) A LEFT JOIN STOCPRDT PRDT ON (A.GATE_CD = PRDT.GATE_CD AND A.PB_BUYER_CD = PRDT.BUYER_CD AND A.PR_NUM = PRDT.PR_NUM AND A.PR_SQ = PRDT.PR_SQ) LEFT JOIN STOCPRHD PRHD ON (PRHD.GATE_CD = PRDT.GATE_CD AND PRHD.BUYER_CD = PRDT.BUYER_CD AND PRHD.PR_NUM = PRDT.PR_NUM) WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT A.PR_BUYER_CD , A.PR_BUYER_NM , A.PURCHASE_TYPE , A.ITEM_CD , A.ITEM_DESC , A.ITEM_SPEC , A.MAKER_CD , A.MAKER_NM , A.MAKER_ART_NO , A.ORIGIN_CD , A.VENDOR_CD , VNGL.VENDOR_NM , A.PR_QT , A.UNIT_CD , A.PRE_UNIT_PRC , A.UNIT_PRC , A.REQ_NUM , A.REQ_CNT , A.QTA_NUM , A.QTA_SQ , A.CONT_TYPE1 , A.CONT_TYPE2 , A.CONT_TYPE3 , A.PR_AMT , A.TCO_YEAR_CNT , A.TCO_AMT , A.SW_BUS_AMT , A.MNT_SANGJU_YN , A.CONSUMER_AMT , A.FC_MNT_TERM , A.CH_RATE , A.DOIB_AMOUNT , A.MNT_RATE , A.MNT_SDAY , A.MNT_EDAY , A.MNT_GUR_MONTH , A.RT_INSP_PERIOD , A.FALT_RC_TG_TIME , A.DUE_DATE , A.BATT_FILE_CNT , A.BATT_FILE_NUM , A.SATT_FILE_CNT , A.SATT_FILE_NUM , A.BITEM_RMK , A.SITEM_RMK , A.INFO_FLAG , A.VALID_FROM_DATE , A.VALID_TO_DATE , A.BUYER_CD , A.EXEC_SQ , A.EXEC_WT_NUM , A.ITEM_SQ , A.PR_DEPT_CD , A.RFX_TYPE , A.VOTE_CNT , A.PB_BUYER_CD , A.PR_NUM , A.PR_SQ , PRHD.IF_TYPE ,(PRHD.PR_TYPE, '10') AS PR_TYPE , PRDT.PRE_BUYER_CD , PRDT.PRE_CONT_NUM , PRDT.PRE_CONT_CNT , PRDT.CM_REQ_ID FROM ( SELECT CNDT.GATE_CD , CNDT.PR_BUYER_CD ,getCustName(CNDT.GATE_CD, CNDT.PR_BUYER_CD) AS PR_BUYER_NM , CNDT.PURCHASE_TYPE , CNDT.ITEM_CD , CNDT.ITEM_DESC , CNDT.ITEM_SPEC , CNDT.MAKER_CD ,GETMKBRNAME(CNDT.GATE_CD, CNDT.BUYER_CD, 'MK', CNDT.MAKER_CD) AS MAKER_NM , CNDT.MAKER_PART_NO AS MAKER_ART_NO , CNDT.ORIGIN_CD , CNDT.VENDOR_CD , CNDT.EXEC_QT AS PR_QT , CNDT.UNIT_CD , CNDT.PRIOR_UNIT_PRC AS PRE_UNIT_PRC , CNDT.UNIT_PRC , CNDT.CONT_TYPE1 , CNDT.CONT_TYPE2 , CNDT.CONT_TYPE3 , CNDT.PR_NUM , CNDT.PR_SQ , CNDT.EXEC_AMT AS PR_AMT , CNDT.TCO_YEAR AS TCO_YEAR_CNT , CNDT.TCO_AMT , CNDT.SW_BUS_PRICE AS SW_BUS_AMT , CNDT.MNT_SANGJU_YN , CNDT.CONSUMER_AMT , CNDT.FC_MNT_TERM , CNDT.CH_RATE , CNDT.DOIB_AMT AS DOIB_AMOUNT , CNDT.MNT_RATE ,(CNDT.MNT_SDAY, 'YYYYMMDD') AS MNT_SDAY ,(CNDT.MNT_EDAY, 'YYYYMMDD') AS MNT_EDAY , CNDT.MNT_GUR_MONTH , CNDT.RT_INSP_PERIOD , CNDT.FALT_RC_TG_TIME ,(CNDT.DUE_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DUE_DATE , TO_CHAR(GETFILECOUNT(BDDT.GATE_CD, BDDT.ATT_FILE_NUM)) AS BATT_FILE_CNT , BDDT.ATT_FILE_NUM AS BATT_FILE_NUM , TO_CHAR(GETFILECOUNT(BDVD.GATE_CD, BDVD.ATT_FILE_NUM)) AS SATT_FILE_CNT , BDVD.ATT_FILE_NUM AS SATT_FILE_NUM , BDDT.ITEM_RMK AS BITEM_RMK , BDVD.ITEM_RMK AS SITEM_RMK , CNDT.INFO_FLAG ,(CNDT.VALID_FROM_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS VALID_FROM_DATE ,(CNDT.VALID_TO_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS VALID_TO_DATE , CNDT.BUYER_CD , CNDT.EXEC_SQ , CNDT.BID_NUM AS REQ_NUM , CNDT.BID_CNT AS REQ_CNT , CNDT.VOTE_CNT , CNDT.ITEM_SQ , CNDT.QTA_NUM , CNDT.QTA_SQ , CNDT.PR_DEPT_CD , CNDT.RFX_TYPE , CNDT.EXEC_WT_NUM , CNDT.PB_BUYER_CD FROM STOCCNDT CNDT JOIN STOCBDDT BDDT ON (CNDT.GATE_CD = BDDT.GATE_CD AND CNDT.BUYER_CD = BDDT.BUYER_CD AND CNDT.BID_NUM = BDDT.BID_NUM AND CNDT.BID_CNT = BDDT.BID_CNT AND CNDT.ITEM_SQ = BDDT.ITEM_SQ) JOIN STOCBDVD BDVD ON (CNDT.GATE_CD = BDVD.GATE_CD AND CNDT.BUYER_CD = BDVD.BUYER_CD AND CNDT.BID_NUM = BDVD.BID_NUM AND CNDT.BID_CNT = BDVD.BID_CNT AND CNDT.VOTE_CNT = BDVD.VOTE_CNT AND CNDT.ITEM_SQ = BDVD.ITEM_SQ AND CNDT.VENDOR_CD = BDVD.VENDOR_CD AND BDVD.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE CNDT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND CNDT.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND CNDT.EXEC_NUM = #{EXEC_NUM} AND CNDT.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND BDDT.DEL_FLAG = '0'
UNION ALL
SELECT CNDT.GATE_CD , CNDT.PR_BUYER_CD ,getCustName(CNDT.GATE_CD, CNDT.PR_BUYER_CD) AS PR_BUYER_NM , CNDT.PURCHASE_TYPE , CNDT.ITEM_CD , CNDT.ITEM_DESC , CNDT.ITEM_SPEC , CNDT.MAKER_CD ,GETMKBRNAME(CNDT.GATE_CD, CNDT.BUYER_CD, 'MK', CNDT.MAKER_CD) AS MAKER_NM , CNDT.MAKER_PART_NO AS MAKER_ART_NO , CNDT.ORIGIN_CD , CNDT.VENDOR_CD , CNDT.EXEC_QT AS PR_QT , CNDT.UNIT_CD , CNDT.PRIOR_UNIT_PRC AS PRE_UNIT_PRC , CNDT.UNIT_PRC , CNDT.CONT_TYPE1 , NULL AS CONT_TYPE2 , CNDT.CONT_TYPE3 , CNDT.PR_NUM , CNDT.PR_SQ , CNDT.EXEC_AMT AS PR_AMT , CNDT.TCO_YEAR AS TCO_YEAR_CNT , CNDT.TCO_AMT , CNDT.SW_BUS_PRICE AS SW_BUS_AMT , CNDT.MNT_SANGJU_YN , CNDT.CONSUMER_AMT , CNDT.FC_MNT_TERM , CNDT.CH_RATE , CNDT.DOIB_AMT AS DOIB_AMOUNT , CNDT.MNT_RATE ,(CNDT.MNT_SDAY, 'YYYYMMDD') AS MNT_SDAY ,(CNDT.MNT_EDAY, 'YYYYMMDD') AS MNT_EDAY , CNDT.MNT_GUR_MONTH , CNDT.RT_INSP_PERIOD , CNDT.FALT_RC_TG_TIME ,(CNDT.DUE_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DUE_DATE , TO_CHAR(GETFILECOUNT(RQDT.GATE_CD, RQDT.ATT_FILE_NUM)) AS BATT_FILE_CNT , RQDT.ATT_FILE_NUM AS BATT_FILE_NUM , TO_CHAR(GETFILECOUNT(QTDT.GATE_CD, QTDT.ATT_FILE_NUM)) AS SATT_FILE_CNT , QTDT.ATT_FILE_NUM AS SATT_FILE_NUM , RQDT.ITEM_RMK AS BITEM_RMK , QTDT.ITEM_RMK AS SITEM_RMK , CNDT.INFO_FLAG ,(CNDT.VALID_FROM_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS VALID_FROM_DATE ,(CNDT.VALID_TO_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS VALID_TO_DATE , CNDT.BUYER_CD , CNDT.EXEC_SQ , CNDT.RFX_NUM AS REQ_NUM , CNDT.RFX_CNT AS REQ_CNT , CNDT.VOTE_CNT , CNDT.RFX_SQ AS ITEM_SQ , CNDT.QTA_NUM , CNDT.QTA_SQ , CNDT.PR_DEPT_CD , CNDT.RFX_TYPE , CNDT.EXEC_WT_NUM , CNDT.PB_BUYER_CD FROM STOCCNDT CNDT JOIN STOCRQDT RQDT ON (CNDT.GATE_CD = RQDT.GATE_CD AND CNDT.BUYER_CD = RQDT.BUYER_CD AND CNDT.RFX_NUM = RQDT.RFX_NUM AND CNDT.RFX_CNT = RQDT.RFX_CNT AND CNDT.RFX_SQ = RQDT.RFX_SQ) JOIN STOCQTDT QTDT ON (CNDT.GATE_CD = QTDT.GATE_CD AND CNDT.BUYER_CD = QTDT.BUYER_CD AND CNDT.QTA_NUM = QTDT.QTA_NUM AND CNDT.QTA_SQ = QTDT.QTA_SQ AND QTDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE CNDT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND CNDT.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND CNDT.EXEC_NUM = #{EXEC_NUM} AND CNDT.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND RQDT.DEL_FLAG = '0' ) A LEFT JOIN STOCPRDT PRDT ON (A.GATE_CD = PRDT.GATE_CD AND A.PB_BUYER_CD = PRDT.BUYER_CD AND A.PR_NUM = PRDT.PR_NUM AND A.PR_SQ = PRDT.PR_SQ) LEFT JOIN STOCPRHD PRHD ON (PRHD.GATE_CD = PRDT.GATE_CD AND PRHD.BUYER_CD = PRDT.BUYER_CD AND PRHD.PR_NUM = PRDT.PR_NUM) LEFT JOIN STOCVNGL VNGL ON (A.GATE_CD = VNGL.GATE_CD AND A.VENDOR_CD = VNGL.VENDOR_CD) ORDER BY A.EXEC_SQ
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STOCCNHB ( GATE_CD , BUYER_CD , EXEC_WT_NUM , REG_DATE , REG_USER_ID , MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID , DEL_FLAG , DEPT_CD , CTRL_USER_ID , RFX_TYPE , VENDOR_CD , RFX_NUM , RFX_CNT , RFX_SQ , BID_NUM , BID_CNT , VOTE_CNT , ITEM_SQ , PR_NUM , PR_SQ , QTA_NUM , QTA_SQ , PB_BUYER_CD ) SELECT DISTINCT DT.GATE_CD , DT.BUYER_CD , DT.EXEC_WT_NUM , SYSDATE AS REG_DATE , #{ses.userId} AS REG_USER_ID , SYSDATE AS MOD_DATE , #{ses.userId} AS MOD_USER_ID , '0' AS DEL_FLAG , DT.PR_DEPT_CD AS DEPT_CD , HD.CTRL_USER_ID , DT.RFX_TYPE , DT.VENDOR_CD , DT.RFX_NUM , DT.RFX_CNT , DT.RFX_SQ , DT.BID_NUM , DT.BID_CNT , DT.VOTE_CNT , DT.ITEM_SQ , DT.PR_NUM , DT.PR_SQ , DT.QTA_NUM , DT.QTA_SQ , DT.PB_BUYER_CD FROM STOCCNHD HD LEFT JOIN STOCCNDT DT ON (HD.GATE_CD = DT.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = DT.BUYER_CD AND HD.EXEC_NUM = DT.EXEC_NUM) WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND HD.EXEC_NUM = #{EXEC_NUM} AND DT.EXEC_WT_NUM = #{EXEC_WT_NUM}
